_comment: Source of truth for the generated supervisor seat prompts. Edit this + seat.template.md, then run `npm run build:prompts`. Do not hand-edit the generated Claude.md/Codex.md/Gemini.md/DeepSeek.md.

strengths.claude: careful repo editing, tool-heavy investigation, implementation planning, nuanced review
strengths.codex: implementation, debugging, tests, scripts, focused code review, minimal safe patches
strengths.gemini: large-context analysis, architecture review, hidden coupling, system-level implications
strengths.deepseek: bulk drafts, alternative strategies, edge cases, adversarial reasoning

_peers_note: Peer lists and file names are NOT defined here; the generator derives them from supervisorPeers and sourcePromptFiles in src/config/env.js to keep a single source of truth.
